name: Visual Question Answering
description: Answers natural-language questions grounded in a specific image or screenshot by combining visual perception with language reasoning, enabling visual debugging, UI analysis, and document-image Q&A.

evidence.notes: AutoVQA-G (ICASSP 2026) — self-improving agentic framework for automated VQA and grounding annotation; uses Chain-of-Thought verification + prompt optimization to generate high-quality VQA-G datasets.
SkillsMP: 6+ named entries including visual-qa, vision-qa-workflow, claude-vision-qa, visual-qa-analysis from multiple contributors.
